text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Hi, 

Build failed on I386 with NOVAR testing, Could you please take a look? 

http://i386.miwibox.org/index.php?action=describe_port&id=2030 

PS: NOVAR means prefixes: LOCALBASE=usr/local X11BASE=usr/local 
PREFIX=/usr/local NOPORTDOCS=yes NOPORTEXAMPLES=yes NOPORTDATA=yes 


Thanks martin
